title: hieracium murorum subsp. pseudopicinum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudopicinum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudopicinum are said to have numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
